issue.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
The application should not provide its own launch screen
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Avoid using + in version numbers; can lead to unpredictable and unrepeatable builds (com.mparticle:android-core:5+)
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices

Overriding `@color/mtrl_textinput_default_box_stroke_color` which is marked as private in com.google.android.material:material:1.11.0. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.

Should not restrict activity to fixed orientation. This may not be suitable for different form factors, causing the app to be letterboxed.

In order to Initialize MParticle, you need to extend android.app.Application, and call MParticle.start() in it's onCreate() method
In order to Initialize MParticle, you need to extend android.app.Application, and call MParticle.start() in it's onCreate() method
The Network Security Configuration allows the use of user certificates in the release version of your app
This folder configuration (`v24`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 24. Merge all the resources in this folder into `drawable`.
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 21
Very long vector path (847 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
